title: What's the maximum complexity limit

posts.author: pauloalves (Yourchar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

After checking the documentation, the GraphQL API complexity limit is 10,000,000 per minute.
However, after performing some tests on my account I was surprised about the actual limit (1,000,000 instead 10,000,000).
Is it possible to set the limit of 10,000,000 to all Monday accounts?

Kind regards.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pauloalves - if you shoot me a DM with your account slug and email I can look into changing this.

-Daniel

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
